title: スプリンターズSの後に・連覇！！

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: How's that, Trainer! I scored an amazing win!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I put Flower in her place too. This is proof I've
gro—
choice_data_list: Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wuh, what?!
choice_data_list: You were incredible!
You were incredible!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: W-well, yes. I did do very well...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Is something wrong? You're more energetic than
usual.
choice_data_list:
Just amazing! You won the Sprinters Stakes
twice in a row!

Just amazing! You won the Sprinters Stakes
twice in a row!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...Oh? Oh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now that you've said it, I do remember winning
first place last year!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I won twice in a row, in a G1 race to boot!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This is certainly a great feat! My classmates must
be very pleased with me!
choice_data_list: It's an amazing feat!
It's an amazing feat!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it is! I'm a super amazing class
representative!
choice_data_list: I just knew you'd do it!
I just knew you'd do it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Of course! You can always count on a class
representative to get results!
choice_data_list: You're really amazing! No wonder, since it's you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Well yes, I am amazing... however! Um, Trainer?
choice_data_list: You're the best Umamusume in the world!
You're the best Umamusume in the world!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
U-um, I know it's weird coming from me... but
aren't you praising me a little too much?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm used to getting compliments, but this is a little
embarrassing.
choice_data_list: And I'm not done complimenting you!
And I'm not done complimenting you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: There are more compliments to go?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Urk...I see!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This only means I should prepare myself! I will
accept any and all compliments from you!
choice_data_list: You're a speed genius!
You're a speed genius!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yes! I am a genius!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'm ready for the next one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as I prepare myself to hand out about 1,000
extra compliments...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'm ready for the next one!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...I wonder what those two are doing?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I only dropped by to say congratulations... Should
I come back later?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'll just whisper it... Congratulations on the
successive win, Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I'll need any more compliments for a
while. I feel like I can just about run anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Maybe I'll do a little too well next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What should I do for the next race? With her
amazing accomplishment this time around, the
sky's the limit!
choice_data_list: Let's try 1,600 meters next!
Let's try 1,600 meters next!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! 1,200 meters ag—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wait! Did you just say 1,600 meters?! That can
only mean one thing!
choice_data_list: Let's shoot for the Mile Championship!
Let's shoot for the Mile Championship!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's 400 meters longer than her specialty... but I
know she can win it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wooo! Finally, we're on the road to mile races!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's great! This feels like winning twice in a row
all over again!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You just leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'll be taking that champion spot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And thus we decide our next race would be the
Mile Championship!
